end,function(N,l,g,H)local V,y9,x9,v,i9,r9,a,X9,m,h,c,d,n,z,S9,Q,N9,D,J9,H9,E,T,i,F9,Y9,t9,q,R9,O9,Z,I,W9,h9,k,J,K9,U9,e9,e,o9,w,B9,S,f9,s,j,A,G,z9,u9,b,P9,g9,L,p,M,l9,C,j9,a9 while N do if
